title: Block Pops
description: Collectible figures of players from your server and from multiple series/anime/games
body:
#
✨ **Block Pops** ✨
**Block Pops** introduces a collectible figure system to Minecraft. Whether you want to collect characters from your favorite media or miniature versions of your friends, Block Pops brings the thrill of the hunt to your world. ## 🎨 Core Features ### Unlock figures in your favorite collections The mod comes with built-in collections with over 150 different starting figures. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u1JjJR7q/images/7391619bd2ff060c2caf3ae12afe77423605e523.png) ### Get figures of your friends This mod is compatible with servers, featuring a special dynamic collection that allows you to obtain figures of all players who have visited the server. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u1JjJR7q/images/936fd3dc554293d81f6c92f125f4165b45ef1399.png) ### The Claw Machine & Collection System Block Pops uses a fair, time-based token system to help you build your collection. This gives players an incentive to play. * **The Claw Machine:** Craft and place this machine to access the menu that allows you to spend tokens on different collections * **Regular Tokens:** You hold up to **3 Regular Tokens** at a time. Each token drops a random box from your selected collection and regenerates automatically every **3 hours** of gameplay. * **Guaranteed Token:** Hate duplicates? Once every day (resetting at 18:00 UTC), you receive a special **Golden Token**. This guarantees a **new, undiscovered figure** from the collection you choose, ensuring you can eventually complete every set! ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u1JjJR7q/images/8f995e4d716103b01891a90a7fa0aa72081c045e.png) ### Select your favorite color When you first enter the world, you can choose your favorite color. That way, when a player gets your figurine, it will come out of the box in the color you chose. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u1JjJR7q/images/4a6b89c7104b99d90dee0b9572889e717216e4cd.png) --- ## 🔧 Technical Details * **Compatibility:** Forge 1.20.1. * **Dependencies:** * **Architectury API** * **GeckoLib** * Built-in compatibility with **Quick Skin**. If installed, figures will take on the appearance of players with it and will also allow you to use figures with HD skins or transparency! _If you find any conflicts or bug, please report them!_ #
~ [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sFZRMwKy88) ~
